use_cases: Toggle boolean settings on and off in app preferences
Enable or disable features and filters in dashboards
Switch between binary states like dark/light mode
Use as a form input for capturing yes/no responses
Control visibility of content sections or panels
ai_summary: A toggle switch component featuring an animated SVG path that creates a unique visual transition between off and on states. Uses stroke-dasharray manipulation and scaleY transformation for the toggle animation, styled with a minimal gray-to-white color scheme. The switch uses a custom SVG shape resembling two connected rounded rectangles and responds to checkbox state changes with smooth CSS transitions.
